column.name: conversation_reference
column.description: Unique identifier for a conversation thread.

column.name: id_ai_interaction_log
column.description: Primary key of the AI interaction log entry.

column.name: configuration_name
column.description: Name of the AI configuration used for the interaction.

column.name: model
column.description: AI model identifier used for the interaction.

column.name: prompt
column.description: The prompt message sent to the AI model.

column.name: response
column.description: The response message returned by the AI model.

column.name: input_tokens
column.description: Number of input tokens consumed by the request.

column.name: output_tokens
column.description: Number of output tokens generated in the response.

column.name: conversation_reference
column.description: Optional conversation identifier linking this log to a conversation thread.

column.name: inference_time_ms
column.description: Total wall-clock time in milliseconds for the full prompt execution.

column.name: is_successful
column.description: Indicates whether the AI interaction completed successfully.

column.name: metadata
column.description: JSON: tool invocations, errors, schema class.
